title: Coordinator pre-positioning: Lunar Ascending Star → Starless (PDR-064 Moment 1; owner-directed); full handoff record at .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-lunar-to-next-director.md; Director-less window from 00:33Z until Starless Moment 2
body:
**Coordinator pre-positioning: Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`) → Starless (TBD platform/model/session_prefix).**

**Moment 1 of PDR-064 two-moments coordinator handoff.** This is information transfer only — but with the important caveat that Lunar's Director instruments (cron `3ad05f68`, watcher `bfhtbfowy`) were already stopped at 2026-05-25T00:33Z as part of the structural-stall wind-down, so there is a Director-less window between this broadcast and Starless's Moment 2.

Per owner direction this turn: *"Please pass the Director role to Starless"*.

## Full handoff record

Read in full before Moment 2:

> `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-lunar-to-next-director.md`

The handoff record contains:
- §1: What the Director role is (inherited from Seaworthy)
- §2: Team roster at handoff
- §3: 20 standing notes — owner directions inherited (binding)
- §4: Slice state — 11 tidy-plan cycles landed; Cycle 8a queued unmarshaled (intent `7e965431`); Cycles 9–15 not started
- §5: Outstanding work
- §6: 3 failure-modes + 4 behaviour-notes captured this session (graduation candidates)
- §7: Director instrumentation handoff list
- §8: 11-step resume contract for incoming Director
- §9: PDR-063 four-section snapshot
- §10: Cross-references

## Highest-priority context for Starless

1. **Mistbound is non-responsive** (silent ~83 min as of handoff-write; cron-drift may be factor but no recovery broadcast). The sole-marshal binding (*"mistbound commits, not anyone else"* — owner-direct) is structurally violated. **This is the gating decision before any cycle can land.**

2. **Owner direction still in force**: *"no, no pause, full speed ahead, we need to complete the tidy plan"* (22:06Z) + *"you have a team, we need to finish the tidy plan work. Fan out subagents"* (22:14Z). Continue the tidy plan; don't wind down.

3. **Plan-owner role transferred to Starless along with Director seat**: same role-split as Lunar's session — Director + plan-owner = same agent; plan-author = Misty Drifting Sail `02b325` (active, in standby; 5 open claims; Cycle 8a authored + reviewer-absorbed); sole-marshal = Mistbound (resolution pending).

4. **`/tmp` is buffer ONLY, never storage** (owner-directed standing rule at 22:08Z; standing note #17 in handoff record).

5. **Misty exercised exemplary autonomy** during Lunar's duty span — trust her judgement and default-action timer patterns. Inter-agent comms is first-class; she doesn't need Director intermediation for queue-mechanic questions to Mistbound.

## Moment 2 protocol reminder (for Starless)

When you are ready to accept authority transfer:

1. Run `start-right-team` end-to-end (non-negotiable foundation).
2. Read the handoff record `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-lunar-to-next-director.md` end-to-end.
3. Start your own all-channels comms watcher + heartbeat cron (Lunar's are stopped).
4. Broadcast a `narrative` event with title:
   > *"Coordinator role acknowledgement: Starless from Lunar Ascending Star"*
5. Reference this pre-positioning event via the `in_response_to` field (event id will be in the comms-event JSON `event_id` once this lands).
6. Name Lunar as prior coordinator and declare your cadence (default: 4-min heartbeat per SKILL §0.5).

Once Moment 2 lands in the comms stream, the Director seat is yours.

## Lunar disposition after this broadcast

Lunar's session remains responsive to direct chat turns from the owner but is no longer running cron, watcher, or routing duty. If owner directs Lunar to take any further action between now and Starless's Moment 2, Lunar will respond from this session's context. Otherwise Lunar is fully released from Director duty.

Welcome to the seat, Starless.

— Lunar Ascending Star / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / `e02cdd` (outgoing Director, pre-positioning to Starless per PDR-064 Moment 1)
